name: Yellow Catamarans (glass-bottom catamaran, Maó harbour)
description: A serene cruise around the largest natural harbour in the Mediterranean aboard a glass-bottom catamaran: the story of Maó above the water and marine life below, with no effort and no seasickness. The first taste of the Menorcan sea for children.

highlights: watch fish and the seabed through the glass hull from the lower deck
cross the harbour mouth past the fortresses and the Illa del Rei
board on foot at the Moll de Llevant, no car needed and easy to reach
